chain.thought: Explanation: Locomotives 9001–9026 and 9030 have names, while 9027–9029 and 9031–9035 have “-” (no name). That totals 27 locomotives with names.

judge_thought: Explanation: Count locomotives with a non-dash entry in the "name" column. Units 9001–9026 (26 locomotives) all have names. Among 9027–9031, only 9030 has a name; the others are dashes. Units 9032–9035 also have dashes. Total with names = 26 + 1 = 27. The Prediction Answer matches this count.
